title: GetPoint Method, Spel Class
syntax:
Function GetPoint (PointNumber As Integer) As SpelPoint

Function GetPoint (PointExpr As String) As SpelPoint
parameters:
PointNumber	Integer expression for a point in the Controller's point memory for the current robot.

PointExpr	String expression.  This can be a point label, "Pxxx", "P*" or "*" with an optional additional modifier.  For example, "P1 @1".
description: Retrieves coordinate data for a point a robot point.
see_also:
SetPoint

GetPoint Example

VB Example:

Dim pt as SpelPoint

pt = m_spel.GetPoint("P*")

pt.X = 25.0

m_spel.Go(pt)

C# Example:

SpelPoint pt;

pt = m_spel.GetPoint("P0");

pt.X = 25.0

m_spel.Go(pt);
examples:
Dim pt as SpelPoint
pt = m_spel.GetPoint("P*")
